steps.title: Compare all three minerals
steps.content: The student wants to compare the hardness of fluorite, quartz, and diamond. On the Mohs scale, larger numbers indicate harder minerals: fluorite is 4, quartz is 7, and diamond is 10.

steps.title: Rank by Mohs number
steps.content: B compares only diamond and quartz. C names all three but gives no actual ranking. D compares only diamond and fluorite and omits quartz. The effective choice ranks all three by hardness from the Mohs numbers. The answer is A.
